pi_items.source: Verified via setup_opentoonz.sh and setup_task.sh which download the official dwanko_run.tnz sample and ensure it is available at this path.
Verified via setup_task.sh (directory creation) and export_result.sh (reading PNGs).
Verified via export_result.sh checking frame 1 at index 0 and verifier.py scoring frame 1.
Verified via export_result.sh checking frame 20 at index 19 and verifier.py scoring frame 20.
Verified via verifier.py which asserts that file_count is at least 20.
Verified via verifier.py which uses > 200 as the threshold for full opacity on frame 1.
Verified via verifier.py which uses < 10 as the threshold for full transparency on frame 20.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires rendering frames 1 through 20 of the 'dwanko_run.tnz' official OpenToonz sample scene to the directory '/home/ga/OpenToonz/output/fade_out'. The verifier evaluates a minimum of 20 generated PNG frames. It specifically checks the alpha channel in the center of the image, expecting Frame 1 to be fully opaque (alpha > 200), Frame 20 to be fully transparent (alpha < 10), and the intermediate frames to show a consistently decreasing opacity.
